query: SELECT fa.id, fa.formId, fa.staffUserId, fa.assignedBy, su.name as staff_name, su.role, su.managerId, f.title as form_title FROM form_assignments fa JOIN staff_users su ON fa.staffUserId = su.id JOIN forms f ON fa.formId = f.id ORDER BY fa.id DESC LIMIT 20;
